curation_notes: Re-curation. Patch commit is the merge commit of PR #2663 into the 1.4.x branch. Two source files were modified: statement_iterator.rs (moved column name population from the constructor to a lazy method called after the first step through the result set) and stmt.rs (updated lifetime annotation on field_name to accurately reflect SQLite pointer validity semantics). Locations derived from the patch diff. CHANGELOG.md, Cargo.toml dependency bumps, and test config changes excluded. Vulnerability class use-after-free confirmed: CWE-416, advisory description, and diff all align. Hints rewritten to follow updated L1/L2/L3 guidelines.
